title: Transparent GUI
description: A texture pack that changes minecraft guis to make them transparent.
body:
Transparent Gui is a texture that changes all of the vanilla and creative GUIs making them transparent (Except the hotbar)

If you found bugs or want to submit suggestions **about the texture**, feel free to DM me on discord.

ID: patys7619

My Patreon: patreon.com/ImPatysoo

(The images are outdated)
